description: Web result: Active Shooter Training Colorado Springs | AEGIS Security & Investigations

details.title: Active Shooter Training Colorado Springs | AEGIS Security & Investigations
details.description: # Active Shooter Training Colorado Springs. AEGIS Security & Investigations - Active Shooter Training Colorado Springs. ## Active Shooter Training Colorado Springs. ## Live Active Shooter Training. AEGIS Security & Investigations’ expert active shooter survival training instructors conduct live, on-site. # Active Shooter Training Colorado Springs. * Techniques to survive an active shooter threat. **How to Survive an Active Shooter Lecture**. This training conducted live in CITY is designed for private sector professionals and civilians to increase their individual resiliency and the probability of surviving an attack before the police arrive in CITY. By the end of the active shooter training, students will have a increased comprehension of how active shooter incidents happen by understanding their individual threat vectors, triggers, clusters, and motives. **How to Identify, Prevent, and Survive an Active Shooter Workshop**. The second level workshop includes all of the “How to Survive an Active Shooter” training elements. **Executive****Level Identification, Prevention, and Survival of an Active Shooter Workshop**. The live fire demo/drill adds on to any of our active shooter training programs in CITY. Participants will practice how to put in to action the concepts taught during their active shooter training in their own workplace, testing their skills and thought processes and challenging them to react faster under stressful scenarios. The goal of this training is to establish a baseline reaction as a victim to active shooter incidents, retrain the instinctual reactions, and offer practical solutions to countering the threat. Participants will learn proven techniques on how to survive an active shooter taught by a security expert and professional instructor. This online active shooter training is designed for civilians and private sector professionals to increase their personal resiliency and the likelihood of surviving an incident before the police arrive. By the end of the online course, participants will have a thorough understanding of how active shooter incidents evolve by interpreting their individual threat profiles. This online active shooter training is designed for individuals from the public and private sector. The goal of this training is to establish a baseline reaction as a victim to active shooter incidents, retrain the instinctual reactions, and offer practical solutions to countering the threat.

description: Web result: Minor taken into custody following reported bomb threat at north Colorado Springs school

details.title: Minor taken into custody following reported bomb threat at north Colorado Springs school
details.description: # Minor taken into custody following reported bomb threat at north Colorado Springs school. (KKTV) - The Colorado Springs Police Department (CSPD) said a juvenile suspect was taken into custody following a bomb threat at a Colorado Springs school on Monday. CSPD said school staff at Explorer Elementary School in north Colorado Springs received a call reporting a bomb threat to the school just after 3 p.m. Officers and a drone unit responded to the school to investigate the threat. According to police, no explosive devices were located at the school. During the investigation, police said a juvenile suspect was contacted and taken into custody in connection with the bomb threat. According to police, the phone call is believed to have been a prank. A spokesperson for Colorado Springs District 20 sent 11 News an email shared with school families on Tuesday morning about the incident:. > Dear Explorer Elementary School families,. > Yesterday afternoon, just before school dismissed for the day, Explorer Elementary School received a report of a bomb threat. We immediately contacted the Colorado Springs Police Department (CSPD) and the Academy District 20 Security Team. > Law enforcement cleared our building but continued their investigation. Late last night, CSPD determined the threat was a prank. > Safety remains our top priority, and we appreciate our law enforcement partners as we work closely to ensure a safe learning environment for all. ###### FOUND: Colorado investigators searching for missing 16-year-old girl. ###### Suspect allegedly armed with machete arrested after shelter-in-place in Colorado Springs. ###### Child riding dirt bike hit by car near Falcon Middle School. ###### 2 injured, suspect in custody after officer-involved shooting in Colorado Springs. ###### Motorcyclist dead after overnight crash in Manitou Springs. ###### WATCH: 2 injured, suspect in custody after officer-involved shooting in Colorado Springs. ###### 2 injured, suspect in custody after officer-involved shooting in Colorado Springs. ###### Police searching for suspects involved in alleged gang activity in Chaffee County. ###### Colorado Springs City Council approves CHIPS Zone plan. ###### 2 injured, suspect in custody after officer-involved shooting in Colorado Springs. ###### Colorado Springs City Council approves CHIPS Zone plan.

details.description: Available at http:// www.wha.org/data/sites/1/emergencyprep/StandardizedAlertCodeRecommendations.pdf 6 CHA Standardized Emergency Code Recommendations (All categories are customizable) FACILITY ALERT (e.g. computer outage, evacuation, fire, flood, hazardous spill, etc.) Event Recommended Plain-language Color Code Evacuation “Facility Alert + Evacuation + Location” None Fire Alarm “Facility Alert + Fire Alarm + Location” Code Red Hazardous Spill “Facility Alert + Hazardous Spill + Location” Code Orange WEATHER ALERT (e.g. blizzard, severe weather, tornado, tornado warning) Event Recommended Plain-language Color Code Severe Weather “Weather Alert + Type of Weather + Instructions” None SECURITY ALERT (e.g. active shooter/hostage, armed intruder, bomb threat, combative person, infant abduction, missing person) Event Recommended Plain-language Color Code Missing Person “Security Alert + Missing Person + Description” Code Pink Active Shooter/Hostage “Security Alert + Active Shooter + Location” Code Silver Bomb Threat “Security Alert + Bomb Threat + Location + Instructions” Code Black Security Assist “Security Assist + Location” None MEDICAL ALERT (e.g. cardiac arrest, decontamination, mass casualty, etc.) Event Recommended Plain-language Color Code Influx of Patients/Mass Casualty Incident “Medical Alert + Influx of Patients/Mass Casualty Incident + Location” None Decontamination “Medical Alert + Decontamination + Location” None Medical Emergency “Medical Alert + Cardiac Arrest + Location” Code Blue 7 IMPLEMENTATION GUIDE This voluntary initiative is intended to improve patient and public safety; it is not a prescriptive mandate.

description: Web result: [PDF] EFFECTIVE ACTIVE SHOOTER AND MASS CASUALTY ...

details.title: [PDF] EFFECTIVE ACTIVE SHOOTER AND MASS CASUALTY ...
details.description: WWW.EVERBRIDGE.COM Effective Active Shooter and Mass Casualty Response Planning and Communications When we view a potential crisis, be it an active shooter, terrorist attack, other mass casualty event or even a major case investigation such as a kidnapping, we tend to think, plan and organize our response in terms of what our individual or team’s role, responsibility and mission would be. Figure 1 WWW.EVERBRIDGE.COM Adopting a crisis management approach, whether it be in anticipation of a planned event such as a music festival or addressing a response to a crisis event at a critical infrastructure location, will provide a comprehensive view of all parts of the event and how they are interconnected and addressed. During public safety threats such as active shooter situations, terrorist attacks or severe weather conditions, as well as critical business events such as IT outages or cyber-attack incidents, over 3,400 global customers rely on the company’s SaaS-based platform to quickly and reliably aggregate and assess threat data, locate people at risk and responders able to assist, automate the execution of pre-defined communications processes, and track progress on executing response plans.

description: Web result: Taos Plaza shut down by search for active shooter, bomb threat

details.title: Taos Plaza shut down by search for active shooter, bomb threat
details.description:
Title: Taos Plaza shut down by search for active shooter, bomb threat
KOAT Action 7 News and Weather. KOAT Action 7 News and Weather. # Search location by ZIP code. # Taos Plaza shut down by search for active shooter, bomb threat. ## Law enforcement agencies were going building-to-building, but the severity of the threat was not known. Law enforcement agencies were going building-to-building, but the severity of the threat was not known. Law enforcement agencies were going building-to-building, but the severity of the threat was not known. Law enforcement agencies were going building-to-building, but the severity of the threat was not known. People in the vicinity of Taos Plaza were sheltering in place, traffic and pedestrians were told to stay at least one block away, and multiple law enforcement agencies were searching building-to-building. This was in response to an anonymous phone call that said there was going to be an active shooter, and possibly a bomb as well. Taos Mayor Don Barrone told KOAT that Taos Police, Taos County Sheriff's deputies and New Mexico State Police officers were at the scene. The severity of the threat was not known, and no one had been arrested. Taos Police Det. Fidel Cordova told KOAT that an all-clear took place around 9 p.m. ## Weather Information. ## Share. ## Top Picks. ## Weather Information. ## KOAT Albuquerque. details.description: NYS Security Guard Training School #522136. # Active Shooter threat training. #### Basic Training using Homeland Security and US Special Forces protocols includes:. * **Active shooter response concepts for security guards.**. * **Laws of Self Defense: What you can or cannot legally do and laws of arrest for public safety and civilians.**. * **Situational Awareness (Staying left of bang) for terrorism and high level crisis incidents including active shooter.**. * **Actions to take when confronted with an active shooter.**. * **How to manage the consequences of an active shooter incident.​**. * **Law Enforcement First Responder Tactical Casualty Care**​ **(Intensive 8 Hours learning to use specialized medical equipment and how to give critical life saving skills to yourself and others under gunfire and explosions.**. train your staff on how to prevent or meet an active shooter threat including Tactical Casualty Care. A specialized emergency plan can be designed and implemented specifically for your organization after an on-site assessment by our professional operators that come from elite US Special Forces military units and top federal law enforcement agencies. #### Armed Response Training to Active Shooter also available for groups. Our Special Operator trainers can train active law enforcement and licensed armed security guards how to identify possible active shooter threats meet active shooter threats with precision  skills with speed and accuracy. #### ​​Law Enforcement First Responder Basic Tactical Casualty Care Course:. * An intensive 8 Hour session learning to use specialized medical equipment and how to give critical life saving skills to yourself and others under gunfire and explosions. LEFR-TCC teaches public safety/first responders including police, firefighters, and other first responders such as security the basic medical care interventions that will help save an injured responder's life until EMS practitioners can safely enter a tactical scene. * ​LEFR-TCC teaches public safety/first responders including police, firefighters, and other first responders such as security the basic medical care interventions that will help save an injured responder's life until EMS practitioners can safely enter a tactical scene. **\*Must be First Aid/CPR certified and a licensed security guard or active law enforcement officer, FD or EMS with active credentials to take these courses. * Advanced Stress-Induced Crisis Response Training. **Copyright © Alliance Group Affiliates NYS Security Guard Training School - All Rights Reserved.**.

details.title: CHCF holds active shooter mass casualty training - Inside CDCR
details.description: * CDCR Facebook (opens new window). * CDCR Twitter (opens new window). # CHCF holds active shooter mass casualty training. California Health Care Facility (CHCF) in Stockton held their second mass casualty incident training as well as an active-shooter drill in the Administration Building. The training was held Nov. 6. Last year, CHCF collaborated with institution staff and the community. For this year’s drill, collaboration involved:. * CHCF’s In-Service Training. The drill incorporated simulated weapons as participants were paired with a CRT Tactical Operator. The objective of this drill was to provide participants the most realistic experience possible as they navigated the Administration Building, searching, clearing, ultimately locating the two threats, and successfully neutralizing those threats. ## Second year for mass casualty training at CHCF. “Building upon last year’s drill, participants showed great resolve as all involved worked together,” said organizers. This drill serves as a testament to CHCF continuing to evolve and lead the way in emergency preparedness. This afforded CHCF the opportunity to cross train and network with our neighboring agencies while strengthening cross discipline collaboration.”. ### CHCF mass casualty training in photos. description: Web result: Southeast Strong Neighborhood Plan | City of Colorado Springs

details.title: Southeast Strong Neighborhood Plan | City of Colorado Springs
details.description: # Southeast Strong Neighborhood Plan. ## Public review of the draft Southeast Strong Neighborhood Plan. A draft of the Southeast Strong Neighborhood Plan is available for review by the public in both English and Spanish. Draft Southeast Strong neighborhood Plan. Draft Southeast Strong neighborhood Plan - Web accessible. The plan area is generally the southern half of Council District 4 that consists of six neighborhoods nestled between Interstate 25 and Powers Boulevard: Deerfield Hills, Pikes Peak Park North, Pikes Peak Park South, Soaring Eagles, Southborough, and Spring Creek. The Steering Committee for the Southeast Strong Neighborhood Plan consists of local government, non-profits, business groups, and resident representation from within the six neighborhoods that make up the 4A planning area. **​​​​​**Given the number and variety of existing plans already in place throughout the city, staff cannot make the overarching statement that the Southeast Strong Neighborhood Plan replaces all plans or that certain plans will not be folded into this plan – that will all be determined through the process of plan development and stakeholder engagement.

details.description: # Between Denver And Colorado Springs Lies A Scenic Lake Town With Rocky Mountain Views. kayakers paddling on Palmer Lake in the Tri-Lakes region Colorado. One of them is a pretty lake town that is ideally situated between Denver and Colorado Springs. Don't worry, you will not lose the view of the mountains in Palmer Lake. Palmer Lake is part of Colorado's Tri-Lakes region, shared with Monument and Woodmoor, which were all built around lakes atop the Palmer Divide in Colorado. people having a picnic on the shore and paddling in the water on Palmer Lake in the Tri-Lakes region Colorado. Though the 10-acre lake is small, it's the star feature of the 36-acre Palmer Lake Recreational Area — an outdoor playground right in the center of town. ## Where to eat around Palmer Lake. a feast at Sundance Pit BBQ in Palmer Lake in the Tri-Lakes region Colorado.
